---
title: "Nav Sangha"
image: profile2.jpeg # Put a professional headshot in your project folder
about:
  template: trestles # This creates a clean, side-by-side layout
  image-shape: rounded
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/avneetsangha/
      target: _blank
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/sanghaav
      target: _blank
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:nvsangha@gmail.com
---

### Hi, I'm Nav Sangha.
**I turn raw data into automated solutions and actionable business insights.**

I am a Data Professional specializing in building robust data pipelines, exploratory analysis, and interactive reporting. I bridge the gap between complex technical architecture and strategic business operations.

**My Core Stack:** Python, Pandas, SQL, BeautifulSoup, and Quarto.

---

### Featured Project: Data Analysis: Automated Data Pipeline
*I built an automated pipeline using Python, BeautifulSoup, and Pandas to extract and structure the data from a 3rd party website.*

[👉 **Read the full case study here**](WebScraper.qmd)
